history.en: The Birman is a docile, quiet cat who loves people and will follow them from room to room. Expect the Birman to want to be involved in what you’re doing. He communicates in a soft voice, mainly to remind you that perhaps it’s time for dinner or maybe for a nice cuddle on the sofa. He enjoys being held and will relax in your arms like a furry baby.
history.zh: 伯曼猫是一种温顺、安静的猫咪，热爱人类，会跟随主人从一个房间到另一个房间。它们希望参与你正在做的事情。它们用柔和的声音交流，主要是提醒你也许是时候吃晚餐了，或者想在沙发上好好依偎一下。它们喜欢被抱着，会像毛茸茸的婴儿一样在你怀里放松。

overview.en: The Birman is a strikingly beautiful cat with a silky, medium-length coat, deep blue eyes, and distinctive white paws. Bred in France, this breed is renowned for its affectionate, gentle, and social nature. Birmans are docile and quiet, yet active enough to enjoy interactive play. They form strong bonds with their human families and will follow you from room to room, wanting to be involved in everything you do. Their soft, melodic voice is used sparingly, mainly to remind you it’s time for dinner or a cuddle. They love being held and will relax in your arms like a furry baby. This breed thrives on companionship and does best when not left alone for long periods. Birmans are generally good with children and other pets, making them ideal family cats. Their calm demeanor and loyalty have earned them the nickname "Sacred Cat of Burma."
overview.zh: 伯曼猫是一种非常美丽的猫，拥有丝滑的中长毛、深邃的蓝眼睛和独特的白色爪子。这个品种起源于法国，以其深情、温和和善于社交的性格而闻名。伯曼猫温顺安静，但足够活跃，喜欢互动游戏。它们与人类家庭建立深厚的情感纽带，会跟着你从一个房间走到另一个房间，想参与你做的每一件事。它们柔和的声音很少使用，主要是提醒你该吃饭了，或者该在沙发上抱抱了。它们喜欢被抱着，会像毛茸茸的婴儿一样在你怀里放松。这个品种非常需要陪伴，不适合长时间独处。伯曼猫通常对孩子和其他宠物很友好，是理想的家庭猫。它们冷静的性情和忠诚为它们赢得了“缅甸圣猫”的昵称。

care.en: Daily care for a Birman is relatively straightforward. Their semi-long, silky coat does not mat easily, but brushing twice a week with a stainless steel comb or slicker brush helps remove loose hair and reduce shedding. During seasonal shedding periods, increase brushing to three or four times weekly. Bathe only when necessary, as their coat is naturally self-cleaning. Trim nails every two weeks and clean ears weekly with a vet-recommended solution. Brush teeth several times a week to prevent dental disease. Birmans are active but not hyperactive; provide at least 15–20 minutes of interactive play daily, using wand toys, puzzle feeders, or laser pointers. They enjoy climbing, so a cat tree or shelves are beneficial. Annual veterinary check-ups are essential, along with routine vaccinations and parasite prevention. Spay or neuter by six months of age.
care.zh: 伯曼猫的日常护理相对简单。它们丝滑的中长毛不易打结，但每周用不锈钢梳或针梳梳理两次，可以去除死毛并减少掉毛。换毛季节需增加至每周三到四次。只在必要时洗澡，因为它们的毛发具有天然自洁能力。每两周修剪一次指甲，每周用兽医推荐的清洁液清理耳朵。每周刷牙数次以预防牙病。伯曼猫活跃但不过度好动，每天需要至少15-20分钟的互动游戏，可使用逗猫棒、益智喂食器或激光笔。它们喜欢攀爬，猫爬架或搁板很有帮助。每年进行一次全面的兽医检查，并按时接种疫苗和驱虫。建议在六个月大时进行绝育手术。

training.en: Birmans are intelligent and eager to please, making them highly trainable. Use positive reinforcement techniques such as treats, praise, and clicker training. Keep sessions short (5–10 minutes) and fun. They can learn basic commands like sit, stay, and come, as well as tricks like high-five or fetch. Litter box training is usually effortless; maintain a clean box with unscented clumping litter. For scratching, provide a sturdy scratching post or pad near their sleeping area, and reward them when they use it. Avoid punishment, as Birmans are sensitive and may become withdrawn. Early socialization is key: expose kittens to various people, sounds, and gentle handling to build confidence. They can also be leash-trained for supervised outdoor adventures, but always use a well-fitted harness. Consistency and patience will yield the best results.
training.zh: 伯曼猫聪明且乐于取悦主人，因此非常容易训练。使用正面强化方法，如零食、表扬和响片训练。每次训练时间应短（5-10分钟）且有趣。它们可以学会基本指令如坐下、等待和过来，也能学会击掌或捡球等技巧。猫砂盆训练通常毫不费力，保持猫砂盆清洁并使用无香型结团猫砂即可。关于抓挠，在它们睡觉区域附近放置一个稳固的猫抓柱或抓板，并在它们使用时给予奖励。避免惩罚，因为伯曼猫敏感，可能会变得退缩。早期社会化至关重要：让幼猫接触不同的人、声音和温和的触摸，以建立自信。它们也可以被训练使用牵引绳，在监督下进行户外探险，但务必使用合身的胸背带。一致性和耐心会带来最佳效果。

diet.en: Birmans thrive on a high-quality, protein-rich diet. Choose a commercial cat food (wet or dry) that lists a named meat source (chicken, turkey, or fish) as the first ingredient. Avoid fillers like corn, wheat, and soy. Because Birmans are prone to obesity, measure portions carefully and follow feeding guidelines based on age, weight, and activity level. Divide daily food into two or three meals. Always provide fresh, clean water; consider a cat water fountain to encourage drinking. Treats should make up no more than 10% of daily calories. Some Birmans may have sensitive stomachs, so introduce new foods gradually over 7–10 days. Consult your veterinarian for specific dietary needs, especially for kittens, seniors, or cats with health issues. Omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids can support coat health. Avoid feeding raw meat or dairy without veterinary approval.
diet.zh: 伯曼猫需要高质量、富含蛋白质的饮食。选择以明确肉类来源（鸡肉、火鸡或鱼）为首要成分的商用猫粮（湿粮或干粮）。避免含有玉米、小麦和大豆等填充物的产品。由于伯曼猫容易肥胖，请仔细测量食量，并根据年龄、体重和活动水平遵循喂养指南。将每日食物分成两到三餐。始终提供新鲜干净的水，考虑使用猫饮水机以鼓励喝水。零食不应超过每日热量的10%。部分伯曼猫可能肠胃敏感，因此新食物需在7-10天内逐步引入。如有特殊饮食需求（尤其是幼猫、老年猫或健康有问题的猫），请咨询兽医。Omega-3和Omega-6脂肪酸有助于维护毛发健康。未经兽医许可，避免喂食生肉或乳制品。

livingTips.en: Birmans adapt well to apartment living as long as they have vertical spaces and interactive toys. A cat tree, window perch, and shelves allow them to climb and observe. They are not strictly indoor cats but should be kept indoors for safety, or provided with a secure, enclosed outdoor catio. Birmans are social and do best with companionship—consider adopting a pair or having someone home during the day. They get along wonderfully with children who are taught to handle them gently, and they often befriend other cats and even cat-friendly dogs. Their gentle nature makes them less likely to scratch or bite. Provide multiple litter boxes (one per cat plus one extra) in quiet, accessible locations. A consistent daily routine helps them feel secure. Avoid loud environments or frequent changes, as stress can affect their health. With love and proper care, a Birman can live 12–16 years.
livingTips.zh: 伯曼猫非常适合公寓生活，只要提供垂直空间和互动玩具即可。猫爬架、窗台和搁板能让它们攀爬和观察。它们并非严格的室内猫，但为了安全应养在室内，或提供封闭安全的猫笼。伯曼猫善于社交，最好有同伴——考虑养两只，或确保白天有人在家。它们与温和对待它们的孩子相处融洽，也常与其他猫甚至友善的狗成为朋友。它们温和的天性使它们不太可能抓人或咬人。在安静、易到达的位置放置多个猫砂盆（每只猫一个，再加一个）。一致的日常作息有助于它们感到安全。避免嘈杂的环境或频繁变化，因为压力会影响它们的健康。在爱与适当照顾下，伯曼猫的寿命可达12-16年。
